text: create aim dialog should allow adding supported and supporting aims
description: clicking "add" should bring up the normal aim search. same style as parent phase. the weight should be settable for each supported aim as it already is. maybe show % regarding total weight sum of parent next to it. and there should be an x to remove the connection. requires a seccond click to confirm (bg color red), blur cancels

status.comment: Implemented UI in AimCreationModal for adding/removing supported (parent) and supporting (child) aims with weights. Updated backend, data store, and UI store to handle connection creation.
